description: Recto: Literary text in Arabic script. Historical or philosophical. Containing various questions; the first is attributed to Amīr al-Mu'minīn and mentions Muʿāwiya. Verso: Judaeo-Arabic poetry. Information from FGP.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
